content.speakerText: Your visa is approved. Here's your passport. Welcome to the US!
content.speakerTextCn: 你的签证通过了，这是你的护照，欢迎来美国！

options.text: Thank you so much! I really appreciate it.
I'm so excited, can I get a discount on my flight?
I don't need this passport, I already have one.
Thanks, but I'm not sure I'm ready to go.

content.explanation: 正确答案是表达真诚感谢的礼貌回应，符合签证通过后的积极语境。干扰项中，第二个选项提出无关请求，第三个否定对方提供的服务，第四个表达犹豫，都不符合此场景应有的积极、感恩态度。

content.speakerText: Don't forget to check your email for SEVIS registration instructions.
content.speakerTextCn: 别忘了查邮箱，会有SEVIS注册说明。

options.text: Got it — I'll check right away.
I don't have an email account.
Why do I need to do that?

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了听懂并立即执行的积极态度。干扰项中，第二个否认基本事实，第三个质疑指令，第四个拖延行动，均不符合‘听懂并承诺执行’的回应要求。

content.speakerText: Thank you for helping me with my visa application. I'm so grateful.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你帮我办理签证申请，我非常感激。

options.text: You're welcome! Have a safe trip and good luck in the US!
I'm busy now, can we talk later?
I hope you get a visa too.

content.explanation: 正确答案是礼貌、温暖的告别回应，既回应感谢又送上祝福。干扰项中，第二个过于随意，削弱了感激氛围；第三个拒绝交流，不合时宜；第四个转移话题，不符合对话逻辑。

content.template: Thank you so much! I really ___ it.
content.hint: 表达强烈感激的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：appreciate it（非常感激）

content.hint: 回应提醒时常用的承诺句型
content.knowledgePoint: Will do（我会做的）——口语中表示承诺执行

content.template: Thanks for everything. I'll ___ you if I have any questions.
content.hint: 正式场合中表示‘联系’的常用动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：contact someone（联系某人）

content.speakerText: Your visa is approved. Here's your passport. Welcome to the US!
content.speakerTextCn: 你的签证通过了，这是你的护照，欢迎来美国！
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much! I really appreciate it.
Thanks! I can't wait to start my journey.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了真诚的感谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了感谢类关键词如 'thank', 'appreciate', 'great'

content.speakerText: Don't forget to check your email for SEVIS registration instructions.
content.speakerTextCn: 别忘了查邮箱，会有SEVIS注册说明。
expectedAnswers: Got it — I'll check right away.
Will do, thanks for reminding me.
Okay, I'll make sure to look for it today.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表明听懂并会执行
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化但礼貌的回应
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'check', 'email', 'SEVIS', 'reminder' 相关表达

content.speakerText: Your visa process is complete. We wish you a successful start in the US.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的签证流程已完成，祝你在美国的起步顺利。
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much! I really appreciate your help.
Thanks! I'm excited and ready to begin.
I'm grateful for your support — have a great day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应祝福并表达感谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合告别场景的语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thank', 'appreciate', 'grateful', 'wish', 'success' 等关键词
